I'm humbled to share something that changed everything.

Last week.

I had to fire my best friend.

It was the hardest decision of my career.

But it taught me everything about leadership.

Here's what I learned. ↓

1. Listen to your team.

2. Communicate clearly.

3. Lead with empathy.

4. Hire slow, fire fast.

5. Customers come first.

I'll never forget what my Uber driver told me on the way to the office that day:

"Boss — sometimes the hardest things are the right things."

Pinch me — I can't believe I get to do this work every day.

Beyond grateful for the journey.

Agree?
